final_response: Contractor access provisioning consistently takes 4 days, causing ~1 week productivity loss per onboarding. Pattern observed Feb/March/current. Route to Operations/IT with SLA recommendation and proactive onboarding checklist.
actions: Identified root cause category: IT provisioning workflow bottleneck
Classified as operational/infrastructure issue requiring cross-functional routing
notes: User explicitly flagged pattern recognition as goal — preventing blind spots on recurring issues
4-day delay is consistent; likely process-driven rather than case-specific
Recommendation prioritizes prevention (pre-request lead time) over firefighting
